TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tamana, title = Tamana, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tamana} }

S.FORM: === Tamana/mamomoay === O tatapangan no tamana/mamomoay O tatapangan no tamana/mamomoay i, o sowal no mafana'ay a tamdaw, sowal sa ora tamana hananay nano 'ayaw naitiniay i Tichonghai no Aowcow saan, itiraho Kosila ato Koroma iraay to amarenak ami sakakahad a mipaloma saan, likor sato tangasa i sasifo'an no kalomihcaan no hekal , malenak to a tailaicowaco:wa a finacadan saan. Sanaw itiniay tono Taywanay a tamana/mamomoay i, o nano naitiniay i Holan a kanatal tora tamdaw no Holan ami pacomod itini i Taywan saan, pangangan sa kola itinia:ay i Taywan a paylang a tamdaw i o Kawlicay ( ko-l√™-tsh√†i) ha nangra a pangangan, nawhani ora "Kool"sanay no Holan atamdaw i, omasalimoroay sanay ko imi nira, dodosato itini i kaholaman ira ko panganganay to Fancilan ( hoan-k√®-n√Ę) hananay. Lomasato itini i Ciokoku pangangan sa cangra i Ciensincay han nangra, itini i Hongkang pangangan nira o Yiecay hanangra, nawhani nano Kanlan ko lalengatan nira, nikaorira i tini i cowaco:wa i adi:hay ko kasasiromaroma a pangangaan, caay ka^min a sowalen, dengsa tonomita o taywataywanan itini i Taywan i, o Kawlicay aca o Kanlancay han a pangangan, loma irako Pawsincay ato Policay sanay a pangangan tora tamana/mamomoay. Masamaanay ko pinangan no tamana/mamomoay.śúČťóúťęėťļóŤŹúÁöĄÁČĻŚĺĶ Tosaay a mihecaan ko kalengaw nira, limoloay kotileng kifetoliy ko papah, apoto'ay ko pikafitan nira, sato o kandaway ko polong papotal no tileng nira, nikaorira ano hacecaycecayen ami fetelak ko kahcecaycecay no papah nira i, o laloma'ay no heci nira satomeli' sanay ito, nowhani mihacecacecay ko papah nira ami tafo a masalimolo, ano tata'ak cingra i matiya o tata'akay a fongoh no tamdaw, o pinangan nira ira ko limoloay mato mali, ira ko matonpi'ay, ira ko macidemay ko hemot, cecay a rengawla cecay a kasa limolo, sanaw i omamomoay haan no mita o Pangcah/'Amis, o takalaw nira i caay pakatafesiw to tosor no o'oe, nikaorira iraay ko caay ka 'eming saan a limolo, macelak ko papah nira 'edeng sa osifo' nira ko limoloay, sanaw ano miarasahaw i, deng yaisifo'ay komi araan. Samanen ami paloma to tamana/mamomoay.Ť¶ĀŚ¶āšĹēÁ®ģś§ćťęėťļóŤŹú O mananamay ami paloma to tamana a tamdaw i, mili'ayaw saca ami sasapar i rikot to sapaloma, ano hakowaen ako ko kakahad topipalomaan, ira kopi hapinang ami sa'osi, masolinga madipot ko sapar, caay kacifao fangcal ko lengaw ko to'as nira, marawod ko 18~38 a lomi^ad, m^edeng to a linahen tayra i womawomahan ami hacecacecay amipaloma, olanan a omah i, mahelekay to ami kangkang awaay to ko kalolengos, fangcal ko cepa' no sota', ano mipaloma i hacecaycecay han matatodong ko la^ed ami salowilowis, ano mipananom i, tinieng i la^ed nira amipananom, patatodongen kopi cepa' ato patayhi tiya fangcal ko lengaw nira, malaod to ko 75~88 a romi'ad i, matatodong a siokaken. O tamana/mamomoay i, itini saca i fangcalay sesa matatodongay ko cepa' nanom ato fangcalay lomi^ad kokalengawan nira, o sowal no mafana'ay paloma a tamdaw i, ano ri'ayawen ami patayhi to ta'i no 'ayam ato mapoheday rengos 'asisiw kora omah i tadacangcalay, romasato o sowal nomi kingkioway to sota' atamdaw, sowalsa itini i PH6~6.8 a sota'an omalaliday koka cepa' a omah i, oranan ko kaolahan no tamana/mamomoay dateng a malengaw, ano adihay tato ko nanom i, caay ka fangcal, ano matalaw ka'icangan no sota' i, nga'aiay tahepoen to sapitahepo a calay. O matatodongay a pipalomaan to tamana/mamomoay i, itiraay i 'ayaw no kacihelangan tora so'emetay alomi'ad, yahelek saho koka si^enawan, misatapang to ami sasapar ma^deng 3~4 ko papah nira i, o takalaw nira ano 10~13 a limian , misatapang to tosapilinah a patayra i omah, tatiih i tata'akay ko cidar ami linah ama tayal, mahelek to ami paloma i, dodo sato ami patatodong a pananom, malawod ko tolo a lipayan i, ga'ay to ami poliyaw, likorsato malalok ami dipot tora tamana tiya fangcal ko lengaw ko to'as nira, tiya caay to kakali'angen no fawo, nawhani maolah ko kalofawo to tamana, ano mifonsa to sapaiyo i, ira ko sapipatatodong to sapifonsa ami patay tora fawo, tiya caay to kakali'ang halo tamana/mamomoay amapolong. O pisiwkakan to tamana/mamomoayťęėťļóŤŹúÁöĄśĒ∂śąź O pisiwkakan to tamana hawi, nano samalata:ray apisiwka i, nani paloma tangasa i pisiwkakan 55 a lomi'ad, o matatodongay a pisiwkakan a lomi'ad i, ma^eng tira i 75~88 alomi'ad, o sahalafinay tangasa ika'ikesan nira i, alatek tangasa i 95~105 alomi'ad, lomasa o 'alaw ami patatodong to to'as nora tamana/mamomoay, nomiso sa afaloco to fana' ami hapinang, ano militod ami ara toya tamana i, mihapinag to pilitodan to po'ot, tiya ma'osaw kotapangan nira oya mato fongohay a tamana dateng koma alaay, iraay ko halo tapangan hananay ami fi'enot, rikor sato ami hacecay ami solinga, ano adihay sato i, aniniay tamdaw i, o kikay to ko matayalay ami polong ami siwka, tiya o paliding ko mami onpang a patayra i ichifa . Ano mina'ang tora tamana/mamomoay i, itila i 0~4¬įC an, toka sienaw nira, metalaw to fa^det, tatiih ama 'icang tato, matatodong koka ce^pa' nira tiya facalay. Sama^neng ami tangtang a koma^en. O tadafangcalay a dateng ko tamana/mamomoay, takalaw ko iyofong nira, iraay koya wisenso-C ,cinwiso ,tansoihoahewo ,ato masama^ama^anay a kongwoce nira, romasato iraho koya wisenso-U nira tosapi adah to doka' no tina'i, togalhaca ira koya yasiwsoanan nira tosapi padang ami forfor to kakaenen. Sanaw ci'icelay ami li'ayaw ami sanga'ay to sa^ca ka ciadada to kolo^kang , sanaw manga'ay a malalid a koma^en to tamana/mamomoay a dateng. Nga'ay a sakohawen, nga'ay a ciyanen, ato misamaamaan ami liawli , adihay komi pasifana'ay to saka fana' ami tangtang akoma^en, aca to sapacamol ami tangtang, noniyahanto afana' amatayal to pakaylaay toya tamana/mamomoay hananay a dateng.(suman 0629/'23 Siwkolan 'Amis) TahapinanganŚŹÉŤÄÉśĖáÁćĽ: 2. ťęėťļóŤŹú ko-l√™-tsh√†i(2020-08-30)Ś≠ėś™Ē
S.PHON: === tamana/mamo~umo~uaj === o~u tatapaŇčan no~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj o~u tatapaŇčan no~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj i, o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mafana °aj a tam…¨~…ģaw, so~uwa…ĺ sa o~ura tamana ńßananaj nano~u °ajaw naitiniaj i ti ¶ńßo~uŇčńßai no~u ao~uw ¶o~uw saan, itirańßo~u ko~usi…ĺa ato~u ko~uro~uma iraaj to~u amar…ônak ami sakakańßa…¨~…ģ a mipa…ĺo~uma saan, …ĺiko~ur sato~u taŇčasa i sasifo~u °an no~u ka…ĺo~umińß ¶aan no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ , ma…ĺ…ônak to~u a tai…ĺai ¶o~uwa ¶o~u:wa a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan saan. sanaw itiniaj to~uno~u tajwanaj a tamana/mamo~umo~uaj i, o~u nano~u naitiniaj i ńßo~u…ĺan a kanata…ĺ to~ura tam…¨~…ģaw no~u ńßo~u…ĺan ami pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ itini i tajwan saan, paŇčaŇčan sa ko~u…ĺa itinia:aj i tajwan a paj…ĺaŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw i o~u kaw…ĺi ¶aj ( ko~u-…ĺ*-tsńß*i) ńßa naŇčra a paŇčaŇčan, nawńßani o~ura "ko~uo~u…ĺ"sanaj no~u ńßo~u…ĺan atam…¨~…ģaw i, o~umasa…ĺimo~uro~uaj sanaj ko~u imi nira, …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~usato~u itini i kańßo~u…ĺaman ira ko~u paŇčaŇčanaj to~u fan ¶i…ĺan ( ńßo~uan-k*-n*) ńßananaj. …ĺo~umasato~u itini i ¶io~uko~uko~u~u paŇčaŇčan sa ¶aŇčra i ¶i…ônsin ¶aj ńßan naŇčra, itini i ńßo~uŇčkaŇč paŇčaŇčan nira o~u ji…ô ¶aj ńßanaŇčra, nawńßani nano~u kan…ĺan ko~u …ĺa…ĺ…ôŇčatan nira, nikao~urira i tini i ¶o~uwa ¶o~u:wa i a…¨~…ģi:ńßaj ko~u kasasiro~umaro~uma a paŇčaŇčaan, ¶aaj ka Ēmin a so~uwa…ĺ…ôn, …¨~…ģ…ôŇčsa to~uno~umita o~u tajwatajwanan itini i tajwan i, o~u kaw…ĺi ¶aj a ¶a o~u kan…ĺan ¶aj ńßan a paŇčaŇčan, …ĺo~uma irako~u pawsin ¶aj ato~u po~u…ĺi ¶aj sanaj a paŇčaŇčan to~ura tamana/mamo~umo~uaj. masamaanaj ko~u pinaŇčan no~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj.******** to~usaaj a mińß…ô ¶aan ko~u ka…ĺ…ôŇčaw nira, …ĺimo~u…ĺo~uaj ko~uti…ĺ…ôŇč kif…ôto~u…ĺij ko~u papańß, apo~uto~u °aj ko~u pikafitan nira, sato~u o~u kan…¨~…ģawaj ko~u sanaj ito~u, no~uwńßani mińßa ¶…ô ¶a ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u papańß nira ami tafo~u a masa…ĺimo~u…ĺo~u, ano~u tata °ak ¶iŇčra i matija o~u tata °akaj a fo~uŇčo~uńß no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, o~u pinaŇčan nira ira ko~u si Ē…ônawan, misatapaŇč to~u ami sasapar ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč *~* ko~u papańß nira i, o~u taka…ĺaw nira ano~u **~** a …ĺimian , misatapaŇč to~u to~usapi…ĺinańß a patajra i o~umańß, tatiińß i tata °akaj ko~u ¶i…¨~…ģar ami …ĺinańß ama taja…ĺ, mańß…ô…ĺ…ôk to~u ami pa…ĺo~uma i, …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~u sato~u ami patato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč a panano~um, ma…ĺawo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u to~u…ĺo~u a …ĺipajan i, *a °aj to~u ami po~u…ĺijaw, …ĺiko~ursato~u ma…ĺa…ĺo~uk ami …¨~…ģipo~ut to~ura tamana tija faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw ko~u to~u °as nira, tija ¶aaj to~u kaka…ĺi °aŇč…ôn no~u fawo~u, nawńßani mao~u…ĺańß ko~u ka…ĺo~ufawo~u to~u tamana, ano~u mifo~unsa to~u sapaijo~u i, ira ko~u sapipatato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u sapifo~unsa ami pataj to~ura fawo~u, tija ¶aaj to~u kaka…ĺi °aŇč ńßa…ĺo~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj amapo~u…ĺo~uŇč. o~u pisiwkakan to~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj****** o~u pisiwkakan to~u tamana ńßawi, nano~u sama…ĺata:raj apisiwka i, nani pa…ĺo~uma taŇčasa i pisiwkakan ** a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ, o~u matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj a pisiwkakan a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ i, ma Ē…ôŇč tira i **~** a…ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ, o~u sańßa…ĺafinaj taŇčasa ika °ik…ôsan nira i, a…ĺat…ôk taŇčasa i **~*** a…ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ, …ĺo~umasa o~u °a…ĺaw ami patato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u to~u °as no~ura tamana/mamo~umo~uaj, no~umiso~u sa afa…ĺo~u ¶o~u to~u fana ° ami ńßapinaŇč, ano~u mi…ĺito~u…¨~…ģ ami ara to~uja tamana i, mińßapina* to~u pi…ĺito~u…¨~…ģan to~u po~u °o~ut, tija ma °o~usaw ko~utapaŇčan nira o~uja mato~u fo~uŇčo~uńßaj a tamana …¨~…ģat…ôŇč ko~uma a…ĺaaj, iraaj ko~u ńßa…ĺo~u tapaŇčan ńßananaj ami fi °…ôno~ut, riko~ur sato~u ami ńßa ¶…ô ¶aj ami so~u…ĺiŇča, ano~u a…¨~…ģińßaj sato~u i, aniniaj tam…¨~…ģaw i, o~u kikaj to~u ko~u mataja…ĺaj ami po~u…ĺo~uŇč ami siwka, tija o~u pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč ko~u mami o~unpaŇč a patajra i i ¶ńßifa . ano~u mina °aŇč to~ura tamana/mamo~umo~uaj i, iti…ĺa i *~** ¶ an, to~uka si…ônaw nira, m…ôta…ĺaw to~u fa Ē…¨~…ģ…ôt, tatiińß ama °i ¶aŇč tato~u, matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ko~uka ¶…ô Ēpa ° nira tija fa ¶a…ĺaj. sama Ēn…ôŇč ami taŇčtaŇč a ko~uma Ē…ôn. o~u ta…¨~…ģafaŇč ¶a…ĺaj a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč ko~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj, taka…ĺaw ko~u ijo~ufo~uŇč nira, iraaj ko~uja wis…ônso~u- ¶ , ¶inwiso~u ,tanso~uińßo~uańß…ôwo~u ,ato~u masama Ēama Ēanaj a ko~uŇčwo~u ¶…ô nira, ro~umasato~u irańßo~u ko~uja wis…ônso~u-o~u~u nira to~usapi a…¨~…ģańß to~u …¨~…ģo~uka ° no~u tina °i, to~u*a…ĺńßa ¶a ira ko~uja jasiwso~uanan nira to~usapi pa…¨~…ģaŇč ami fo~urfo~ur to~u kaka…ôn…ôn. sanaw ¶i °i ¶…ô…ĺaj ami …ĺi °ajaw ami saŇča °aj to~u sa Ē ¶a ka ¶ia…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa to~u ko~u…ĺo~u ĒkaŇč , sanaw maŇča °aj a ma…ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ a ko~uma Ē…ôn to~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč. Ňča °aj a sako~uńßaw…ôn, Ňča °aj a ¶ijan…ôn, ato~u misamaamaan ami …ĺiaw…ĺi , a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~umi pasifana °aj to~u saka fana ° ami taŇčtaŇč ako~uma Ē…ôn, a ¶a to~u sapa ¶amo~u…ĺ ami taŇčtaŇč, no~unijańßanto~u afana ° amataja…ĺ to~u pakaj…ĺaaj to~uja tamana/mamo~umo~uaj ńßananaj a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč.(so~u~uman ****/ °** siwko~u…ĺan °amis) tańßapinaŇčan****: *. *** ko~u-…ĺ*-tsńß*i(****-**-**)**
S.FORM: === Tamana/mamomoay === O tatapangan no tamana/mamomoay O tatapangan no tamana/mamomoay i, o sowal no mafana'ay a tamdaw, sowal sa ora tamana hananay nano 'ayaw naitiniay i Tichonghai no Aowcow saan, itiraho Kosila ato Koroma iraay to amarenak ami sakakahad a mipaloma saan, likor sato tangasa i sasifo'an no kalomihcaan no hekal , malenak to a tailaicowaco:wa a finacadan saan. Sanaw itiniay tono Taywanay a tamana/mamomoay i, o nano naitiniay i Holan a kanatal tora tamdaw no Holan ami pacomod itini i Taywan saan, pangangan sa kola itinia:ay i Taywan a paylang a tamdaw i o Kawlicay ( ko-l√™-tsh√†i) ha nangra a pangangan, nawhani ora "Kool"sanay no Holan atamdaw i, omasalimoroay sanay ko imi nira, dodosato itini i kaholaman ira ko panganganay to Fancilan ( hoan-k√®-n√Ę) hananay. Lomasato itini i Ciokoku pangangan sa cangra i Ciensincay han nangra, itini i Hongkang pangangan nira o Yiecay hanangra, nawhani nano Kanlan ko lalengatan nira, nikaorira i tini i cowaco:wa i adi:hay ko kasasiromaroma a pangangaan, caay ka^min a sowalen, dengsa tonomita o taywataywanan itini i Taywan i, o Kawlicay aca o Kanlancay han a pangangan, loma irako Pawsincay ato Policay sanay a pangangan tora tamana/mamomoay. Masamaanay ko pinangan no tamana/mamomoay.śúČťóúťęėťļóŤŹúÁöĄÁČĻŚĺĶ Tosaay a mihecaan ko kalengaw nira, limoloay kotileng kifetoliy ko papah, apoto'ay ko pikafitan nira, sato o kandaway ko polong papotal no tileng nira, nikaorira ano hacecaycecayen ami fetelak ko kahcecaycecay no papah nira i, o laloma'ay no heci nira satomeli' sanay ito, nowhani mihacecacecay ko papah nira ami tafo a masalimolo, ano tata'ak cingra i matiya o tata'akay a fongoh no tamdaw, o pinangan nira ira ko limoloay mato mali, ira ko matonpi'ay, ira ko macidemay ko hemot, cecay a rengawla cecay a kasa limolo, sanaw i omamomoay haan no mita o Pangcah/'Amis, o takalaw nira i caay pakatafesiw to tosor no o'oe, nikaorira iraay ko caay ka 'eming saan a limolo, macelak ko papah nira 'edeng sa osifo' nira ko limoloay, sanaw ano miarasahaw i, deng yaisifo'ay komi araan. Samanen ami paloma to tamana/mamomoay.Ť¶ĀŚ¶āšĹēÁ®ģś§ćťęėťļóŤŹú O mananamay ami paloma to tamana a tamdaw i, mili'ayaw saca ami sasapar i rikot to sapaloma, ano hakowaen ako ko kakahad topipalomaan, ira kopi hapinang ami sa'osi, masolinga madipot ko sapar, caay kacifao fangcal ko lengaw ko to'as nira, marawod ko 18~38 a lomi^ad, m^edeng to a linahen tayra i womawomahan ami hacecacecay amipaloma, olanan a omah i, mahelekay to ami kangkang awaay to ko kalolengos, fangcal ko cepa' no sota', ano mipaloma i hacecaycecay han matatodong ko la^ed ami salowilowis, ano mipananom i, tinieng i la^ed nira amipananom, patatodongen kopi cepa' ato patayhi tiya fangcal ko lengaw nira, malaod to ko 75~88 a romi'ad i, matatodong a siokaken. O tamana/mamomoay i, itini saca i fangcalay sesa matatodongay ko cepa' nanom ato fangcalay lomi^ad kokalengawan nira, o sowal no mafana'ay paloma a tamdaw i, ano ri'ayawen ami patayhi to ta'i no 'ayam ato mapoheday rengos 'asisiw kora omah i tadacangcalay, romasato o sowal nomi kingkioway to sota' atamdaw, sowalsa itini i PH6~6.8 a sota'an omalaliday koka cepa' a omah i, oranan ko kaolahan no tamana/mamomoay dateng a malengaw, ano adihay tato ko nanom i, caay ka fangcal, ano matalaw ka'icangan no sota' i, nga'aiay tahepoen to sapitahepo a calay. O matatodongay a pipalomaan to tamana/mamomoay i, itiraay i 'ayaw no kacihelangan tora so'emetay alomi'ad, yahelek saho koka si^enawan, misatapang to ami sasapar ma^deng 3~4 ko papah nira i, o takalaw nira ano 10~13 a limian , misatapang to tosapilinah a patayra i omah, tatiih i tata'akay ko cidar ami linah ama tayal, mahelek to ami paloma i, dodo sato ami patatodong a pananom, malawod ko tolo a lipayan i, ga'ay to ami poliyaw, likorsato malalok ami dipot tora tamana tiya fangcal ko lengaw ko to'as nira, tiya caay to kakali'angen no fawo, nawhani maolah ko kalofawo to tamana, ano mifonsa to sapaiyo i, ira ko sapipatatodong to sapifonsa ami patay tora fawo, tiya caay to kakali'ang halo tamana/mamomoay amapolong. O pisiwkakan to tamana/mamomoayťęėťļóŤŹúÁöĄśĒ∂śąź O pisiwkakan to tamana hawi, nano samalata:ray apisiwka i, nani paloma tangasa i pisiwkakan 55 a lomi'ad, o matatodongay a pisiwkakan a lomi'ad i, ma^eng tira i 75~88 alomi'ad, o sahalafinay tangasa ika'ikesan nira i, alatek tangasa i 95~105 alomi'ad, lomasa o 'alaw ami patatodong to to'as nora tamana/mamomoay, nomiso sa afaloco to fana' ami hapinang, ano militod ami ara toya tamana i, mihapinag to pilitodan to po'ot, tiya ma'osaw kotapangan nira oya mato fongohay a tamana dateng koma alaay, iraay ko halo tapangan hananay ami fi'enot, rikor sato ami hacecay ami solinga, ano adihay sato i, aniniay tamdaw i, o kikay to ko matayalay ami polong ami siwka, tiya o paliding ko mami onpang a patayra i ichifa . Ano mina'ang tora tamana/mamomoay i, itila i 0~4¬įC an, toka sienaw nira, metalaw to fa^det, tatiih ama 'icang tato, matatodong koka ce^pa' nira tiya facalay. Sama^neng ami tangtang a koma^en. O tadafangcalay a dateng ko tamana/mamomoay, takalaw ko iyofong nira, iraay koya wisenso-C ,cinwiso ,tansoihoahewo ,ato masama^ama^anay a kongwoce nira, romasato iraho koya wisenso-U nira tosapi adah to doka' no tina'i, togalhaca ira koya yasiwsoanan nira tosapi padang ami forfor to kakaenen. Sanaw ci'icelay ami li'ayaw ami sanga'ay to sa^ca ka ciadada to kolo^kang , sanaw manga'ay a malalid a koma^en to tamana/mamomoay a dateng. Nga'ay a sakohawen, nga'ay a ciyanen, ato misamaamaan ami liawli , adihay komi pasifana'ay to saka fana' ami tangtang akoma^en, aca to sapacamol ami tangtang, noniyahanto afana' amatayal to pakaylaay toya tamana/mamomoay hananay a dateng.(suman 0629/'23 Siwkolan 'Amis) TahapinanganŚŹÉŤÄÉśĖáÁćĽ: 2. ťęėťļóŤŹú ko-l√™-tsh√†i(2020-08-30)Ś≠ėś™Ē
S.PHON: === tamana/mamo~umo~uaj === o~u tatapaŇčan no~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj o~u tatapaŇčan no~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj i, o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mafana °aj a tam…¨~…ģaw, so~uwa…ĺ sa o~ura tamana ńßananaj nano~u °ajaw naitiniaj i ti ¶ńßo~uŇčńßai no~u ao~uw ¶o~uw saan, itirańßo~u ko~usi…ĺa ato~u ko~uro~uma iraaj to~u amar…ônak ami sakakańßa…¨~…ģ a mipa…ĺo~uma saan, …ĺiko~ur sato~u taŇčasa i sasifo~u °an no~u ka…ĺo~umińß ¶aan no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ , ma…ĺ…ônak to~u a tai…ĺai ¶o~uwa ¶o~u:wa a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan saan. sanaw itiniaj to~uno~u tajwanaj a tamana/mamo~umo~uaj i, o~u nano~u naitiniaj i ńßo~u…ĺan a kanata…ĺ to~ura tam…¨~…ģaw no~u ńßo~u…ĺan ami pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ itini i tajwan saan, paŇčaŇčan sa ko~u…ĺa itinia:aj i tajwan a paj…ĺaŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw i o~u kaw…ĺi ¶aj ( ko~u-…ĺ*-tsńß*i) ńßa naŇčra a paŇčaŇčan, nawńßani o~ura "ko~uo~u…ĺ"sanaj no~u ńßo~u…ĺan atam…¨~…ģaw i, o~umasa…ĺimo~uro~uaj sanaj ko~u imi nira, …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~usato~u itini i kańßo~u…ĺaman ira ko~u paŇčaŇčanaj to~u fan ¶i…ĺan ( ńßo~uan-k*-n*) ńßananaj. …ĺo~umasato~u itini i ¶io~uko~uko~u~u paŇčaŇčan sa ¶aŇčra i ¶i…ônsin ¶aj ńßan naŇčra, itini i ńßo~uŇčkaŇč paŇčaŇčan nira o~u ji…ô ¶aj ńßanaŇčra, nawńßani nano~u kan…ĺan ko~u …ĺa…ĺ…ôŇčatan nira, nikao~urira i tini i ¶o~uwa ¶o~u:wa i a…¨~…ģi:ńßaj ko~u kasasiro~umaro~uma a paŇčaŇčaan, ¶aaj ka Ēmin a so~uwa…ĺ…ôn, …¨~…ģ…ôŇčsa to~uno~umita o~u tajwatajwanan itini i tajwan i, o~u kaw…ĺi ¶aj a ¶a o~u kan…ĺan ¶aj ńßan a paŇčaŇčan, …ĺo~uma irako~u pawsin ¶aj ato~u po~u…ĺi ¶aj sanaj a paŇčaŇčan to~ura tamana/mamo~umo~uaj. masamaanaj ko~u pinaŇčan no~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj.******** to~usaaj a mińß…ô ¶aan ko~u ka…ĺ…ôŇčaw nira, …ĺimo~u…ĺo~uaj ko~uti…ĺ…ôŇč kif…ôto~u…ĺij ko~u papańß, apo~uto~u °aj ko~u pikafitan nira, sato~u o~u kan…¨~…ģawaj ko~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč papo~uta…ĺ no~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč nira, nikao~urira ano~u ńßa ¶…ô ¶aj ¶…ô ¶aj…ôn ami f…ôt…ô…ĺak ko~u kańß ¶…ô ¶aj ¶…ô ¶aj no~u papańß nira i, o~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °aj no~u ńß…ô ¶i nira sato~um…ô…ĺi ° sanaj ito~u, no~uwńßani mińßa ¶…ô ¶a ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u papańß nira ami tafo~u a masa…ĺimo~u…ĺo~u, ano~u tata °ak ¶iŇčra i matija o~u tata °akaj a fo~uŇčo~uńß no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, o~u pinaŇčan nira ira ko~u …ĺimo~u…ĺo~uaj mato~u ma…ĺi, ira ko~u mato~unpi °aj, ira ko~u ma ¶i…¨~…ģ…ômaj ko~u ńß…ômo~ut, ¶…ô ¶aj a r…ôŇčaw…ĺa ¶…ô ¶aj a kasa …ĺimo~u…ĺo~u, sanaw i o~umamo~umo~uaj ńßaan no~u mita o~u paŇč ¶ańß/ °amis, o~u taka…ĺaw nira i ¶aaj pakataf…ôsiw to~u to~uso~ur no~u o~u °o~u…ô, nikao~urira iraaj ko~u ¶aaj ka °…ômiŇč saan a …ĺimo~u…ĺo~u, ma ¶…ô…ĺak ko~u papańß nira °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč sa o~usifo~u ° nira ko~u …ĺimo~u…ĺo~uaj, sanaw ano~u miarasańßaw i, …¨~…ģ…ôŇč jaisifo~u °aj ko~umi araan. saman…ôn ami pa…ĺo~uma to~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj.******** o~u mananamaj ami pa…ĺo~uma to~u tamana a tam…¨~…ģaw i, mi…ĺi °ajaw sa ¶a ami sasapar i riko~ut to~u sapa…ĺo~uma, ano~u ńßako~uwa…ôn ako~u ko~u kakańßa…¨~…ģ to~upipa…ĺo~umaan, ira ko~upi ńßapinaŇč ami sa °o~usi, maso~u…ĺiŇča ma…¨~…ģipo~ut ko~u sapar, ¶aaj ka ¶ifao~u faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw ko~u to~u °as nira, marawo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u **~** a …ĺo~umi Ēa…¨~…ģ, m Ē…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč to~u a …ĺinańß…ôn tajra i wo~umawo~umańßan ami ńßa ¶…ô ¶a ¶…ô ¶aj amipa…ĺo~uma, o~u…ĺanan a o~umańß i, mańß…ô…ĺ…ôkaj to~u ami kaŇčkaŇč awaaj to~u ko~u ka…ĺo~u…ĺ…ôŇčo~us, faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u ¶…ôpa ° no~u so~uta °, ano~u mipa…ĺo~uma i ńßa ¶…ô ¶aj ¶…ô ¶aj ńßan matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ko~u …ĺa Ē…ô…¨~…ģ ami sa…ĺo~uwi…ĺo~uwis, ano~u mipanano~um i, tini…ôŇč i …ĺa Ē…ô…¨~…ģ nira amipanano~um, patato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč…ôn ko~upi ¶…ôpa ° ato~u patajńßi tija faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw nira, ma…ĺao~u…¨~…ģ to~u ko~u **~** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i, matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč a sio~ukak…ôn. o~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj i, itini sa ¶a i faŇč ¶a…ĺaj s…ôsa matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj ko~u ¶…ôpa ° nano~um ato~u faŇč ¶a…ĺaj …ĺo~umi Ēa…¨~…ģ ko~uka…ĺ…ôŇčawan nira, o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mafana °aj pa…ĺo~uma a tam…¨~…ģaw i, ano~u ri °ajaw…ôn ami patajńßi to~u ta °i no~u °ajam ato~u mapo~uńß…ô…¨~…ģaj r…ôŇčo~us °asisiw ko~ura o~umańß i ta…¨~…ģa ¶aŇč ¶a…ĺaj, ro~umasato~u o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~umi kiŇčkio~uwaj to~u so~uta ° atam…¨~…ģaw, so~uwa…ĺsa itini i pńß*~*.* a so~uta °an o~uma…ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģaj ko~uka ¶…ôpa ° a o~umańß i, o~uranan ko~u kao~u…ĺańßan no~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj …¨~…ģat…ôŇč a ma…ĺ…ôŇčaw, ano~u a…¨~…ģińßaj tato~u ko~u nano~um i, ¶aaj ka faŇč ¶a…ĺ, ano~u mata…ĺaw ka °i ¶aŇčan no~u so~uta ° i, Ňča °aiaj tańß…ôpo~u…ôn to~u sapitańß…ôpo~u a ¶a…ĺaj. o~u matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj a pipa…ĺo~umaan to~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj i, itiraaj i °ajaw no~u ka ¶ińß…ô…ĺaŇčan to~ura so~u °…ôm…ôtaj a…ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ, jańß…ô…ĺ…ôk sańßo~u ko~uka si Ē…ônawan, misatapaŇč to~u ami sasapar ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč *~* ko~u papańß nira i, o~u taka…ĺaw nira ano~u **~** a …ĺimian , misatapaŇč to~u to~usapi…ĺinańß a patajra i o~umańß, tatiińß i tata °akaj ko~u ¶i…¨~…ģar ami …ĺinańß ama taja…ĺ, mańß…ô…ĺ…ôk to~u ami pa…ĺo~uma i, …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~u sato~u ami patato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč a panano~um, ma…ĺawo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u to~u…ĺo~u a …ĺipajan i, *a °aj to~u ami po~u…ĺijaw, …ĺiko~ursato~u ma…ĺa…ĺo~uk ami …¨~…ģipo~ut to~ura tamana tija faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw ko~u to~u °as nira, tija ¶aaj to~u kaka…ĺi °aŇč…ôn no~u fawo~u, nawńßani mao~u…ĺańß ko~u ka…ĺo~ufawo~u to~u tamana, ano~u mifo~unsa to~u sapaijo~u i, ira ko~u sapipatato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u sapifo~unsa ami pataj to~ura fawo~u, tija ¶aaj to~u kaka…ĺi °aŇč ńßa…ĺo~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj amapo~u…ĺo~uŇč. o~u pisiwkakan to~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj****** o~u pisiwkakan to~u tamana ńßawi, nano~u sama…ĺata:raj apisiwka i, nani pa…ĺo~uma taŇčasa i pisiwkakan ** a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ, o~u matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj a pisiwkakan a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ i, ma Ē…ôŇč tira i **~** a…ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ, o~u sańßa…ĺafinaj taŇčasa ika °ik…ôsan nira i, a…ĺat…ôk taŇčasa i **~*** a…ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ, …ĺo~umasa o~u °a…ĺaw ami patato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u to~u °as no~ura tamana/mamo~umo~uaj, no~umiso~u sa afa…ĺo~u ¶o~u to~u fana ° ami ńßapinaŇč, ano~u mi…ĺito~u…¨~…ģ ami ara to~uja tamana i, mińßapina* to~u pi…ĺito~u…¨~…ģan to~u po~u °o~ut, tija ma °o~usaw ko~utapaŇčan nira o~uja mato~u fo~uŇčo~uńßaj a tamana …¨~…ģat…ôŇč ko~uma a…ĺaaj, iraaj ko~u ńßa…ĺo~u tapaŇčan ńßananaj ami fi °…ôno~ut, riko~ur sato~u ami ńßa ¶…ô ¶aj ami so~u…ĺiŇča, ano~u a…¨~…ģińßaj sato~u i, aniniaj tam…¨~…ģaw i, o~u kikaj to~u ko~u mataja…ĺaj ami po~u…ĺo~uŇč ami siwka, tija o~u pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč ko~u mami o~unpaŇč a patajra i i ¶ńßifa . ano~u mina °aŇč to~ura tamana/mamo~umo~uaj i, iti…ĺa i *~** ¶ an, to~uka si…ônaw nira, m…ôta…ĺaw to~u fa Ē…¨~…ģ…ôt, tatiińß ama °i ¶aŇč tato~u, matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ko~uka ¶…ô Ēpa ° nira tija fa ¶a…ĺaj. sama Ēn…ôŇč ami taŇčtaŇč a ko~uma Ē…ôn. o~u ta…¨~…ģafaŇč ¶a…ĺaj a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč ko~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj, taka…ĺaw ko~u ijo~ufo~uŇč nira, iraaj ko~uja wis…ônso~u- ¶ , ¶inwiso~u ,tanso~uińßo~uańß…ôwo~u ,ato~u masama Ēama Ēanaj a ko~uŇčwo~u ¶…ô nira, ro~umasato~u irańßo~u ko~uja wis…ônso~u-o~u~u nira to~usapi a…¨~…ģańß to~u …¨~…ģo~uka ° no~u tina °i, to~u*a…ĺńßa ¶a ira ko~uja jasiwso~uanan nira to~usapi pa…¨~…ģaŇč ami fo~urfo~ur to~u kaka…ôn…ôn. sanaw ¶i °i ¶…ô…ĺaj ami …ĺi °ajaw ami saŇča °aj to~u sa Ē ¶a ka ¶ia…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa to~u ko~u…ĺo~u ĒkaŇč , sanaw maŇča °aj a ma…ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ a ko~uma Ē…ôn to~u tamana/mamo~umo~uaj a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč. Ňča °aj a sako~uńßaw…ôn, Ňča °aj a ¶ijan…ôn, ato~u misamaamaan ami …ĺiaw…ĺi , a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~umi pasifana °aj to~u saka fana ° ami taŇčtaŇč ako~uma Ē…ôn, a ¶a to~u sapa ¶amo~u…ĺ ami taŇčtaŇč, no~unijańßanto~u afana ° amataja…ĺ to~u pakaj…ĺaaj to~uja tamana/mamo~umo~uaj ńßananaj a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč.(so~u~uman ****/ °** siwko~u…ĺan °amis) tańßapinaŇčan****: *. *** ko~u-…ĺ*-tsńß*i(****-**-**)**
